About me

I am a machine learning researcher working at Basecamp Research. I am particularly interested in applications of machine learning to the life sciences.

This website is a dump of my thoughts. It is not intended to be educational, informative or useful in any way. But if, by accident, you find any post on this site is well described by those adjectives then please inform me immediately.

books.
